case_title: JOVES, LETECIA VS DE GUZMAN, JERRY

docket_entries.description: SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT DE GUZMAN, JERRY
THIS IS NOT A JUDGMENT, BUT AN ORDER BY THE COMMISSIONER. SEE FOLDER FOR DETIALS OF ORDER.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF JOVES, LETECIA IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT DE GUZMAN, JERRY SEE ATTACHED AGREEMENT/STIPULATION FOR ENTRY OF JUDGMENT. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
CERT MAIL OF PLTF'S CLAIM SENT TO JERRY DE GUZMAN RETURNED--UNCLAIMED
PLFT'S MOTION FOR RECONSIDERATION FILED. NOTICED SENT TO DEFT. SUSPENSE DTE 4/3/00. $14.00 CASH PD.
MOTION RECONSIDERATION FILED BY PLAINTIFF JOVES, LETECIA HEARING SET FOR JUN-07-2000 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF JOVES, LETECIA RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT DE GUZMAN, JERRY $901.72 PRINCIPAL, $26.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $927.72, MOTION TO CORRECT JUDGMENT GRANTED. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
SC MOTION DISPOSITION MOTION RECONSIDERATION OF JUN-07-2000, GRANTED
NOTICE OF ENTRY OF JUDGMENT TO JERRY DE GUZMAN RETURNED-- ATTEMPTED NOT KNOWN;
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $1,060.00 FILED BY JOVES, LETECIA AS TO DEFENDANT DE GUZMAN, JERRY ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR FEB-02-2000 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506
